productDisplayName: Baggit Women Pink Raas Barati Purse

With handy compartments and slim, sleek design, this purse is the perfect way to pep up your evening portfolio.Product Details Pink purse crafted from corduroy Has a magnetic press button flap closureOne main zippered compartment Three zippered pockets covered by the flap One zippered pocket on the back Branding on the flapMaterial and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustSize Height: 9 cm Width: 18 cm Depth: 3 cm
